Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this first tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “Clarity Tool”. This is a very important tool with the main focus of getting your
attendees focused on where they want to point their ship. If they know exactly where they are and where they want to go, it will make accomplishing
their goals so much easier. That is where you and this tool come in handy!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down your current status with 100% truth
Write down your one year goal by looking back from the future
Write down why these goals are so important
Write down the capabilities you need to accomplish these goals.
Finish the “Clarity Tool” with Dean completely.
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
